value.found_quote: Claude Code can connect to hundreds of external tools and data sources through the Model Context Protocol (MCP), an open source standard for AI-tool integrations. MCP servers give Claude Code access to your tools, databases, and APIs.
value.rationale: The page is Anthropic's official Claude Code documentation describing MCP support and connectors ("Browse reviewed connectors in the Anthropic Directory"). It thoroughly documents Claude Code's MCP integration as a current feature, substantiating the claim. The cited blog URLs in the claim are irrelevant; the fetched page itself confirms the offering.
